metrics.avg_time_spent_seconds: Average session duration per active user, in seconds.
metrics.dau: Daily active users from Nexus traction API for that telco day.
metrics.dau_ga: Daily active users from GA4 (activeUsers) for the telco pagePath that day.
metrics.mau: Monthly active users from Nexus traction API for that telco day.
metrics.mau_ga: Rolling 30-day active users from GA4 (activeUsers) for the telco pagePath ending on that day.
metrics.new_users: Count of users who registered on that day.
metrics.repeated_users: Users who returned after a prior visit (repeat engagement).
metrics.total_bnry_tokens_earned: Total amount of BNRY tokens minted or earned by users that day.
metrics.total_bnry_tokens_spent: Total amount of BNRY tokens spent or burned by users that day.
metrics.total_credit: Sum of all credit (incoming) wallet movements.
metrics.total_debit: Sum of all debit (outgoing) wallet movements.
metrics.total_spin_usage: Number of spin wheel plays that day.
metrics.total_spin_win_tokens: BNRY tokens awarded from spin wheel wins.
metrics.total_transactions: Total wallet transactions (all types) that day.
metrics.total_user_games: Distinct users who played games that day.
metrics.total_views_homepage: GA4 screen page views on the telco homepage (pagePath) for that day.
metrics.unique_spin_users: Distinct users who used the spin wheel.

transaction_type_field_descriptions.count: Number of transactions of this type.
transaction_type_field_descriptions.amount: Total BNRY amount for this transaction type.
transaction_type_field_descriptions.unique_users: Distinct users with at least one transaction of this type.

known_transaction_type_descriptions.purchase: Voucher or Stripe purchases (from 2026-05-30 onward; not access pass).

note: metrics: core allowlist columns. Build transaction keys as tx.<transaction_type>.<field> using transaction_type_pattern, transaction_type_fields, and known_transaction_types.
